description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design with a mix of beige and gray exterior finishes. The front facade includes a spacious wooden deck, large glass doors, and a balcony with a glass railing above the main entrance. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and there is a driveway with parked cars leading to a double garage. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with minimal windows and a small green area. The overall structure is low and wide, emphasizing horizontal lines and open outdoor spaces. The use of large windows and open decking suggests a focus on natural light and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a beige and gray exterior, large windows, a wooden deck, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden deck, main entrance, balcony, and driveway with cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, garage doors, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, garage, and a small green area.
description_view_3: Back angle showing the deck, rear lawn, and outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
